info.title: Transmute API
info.description: API to interact with Transmute without the need for a frontend

get.description: Simple liveness check to confirm the server is running
Readiness check to confirm the server is ready to handle requests

503.description: Not ready - one or more checks failed

get.description: List all uploaded files for the current user

post.description: Upload a file and save it to the server
Batch download converted files as a ZIP archive

200.description: ZIP file containing all converted files

404.description: One or more converted files not found

delete.description: Delete all uploaded files for the current user

get.description: List all completed conversions for the current user.

200.description: List of completed conversions with original and converted file metadata

post.description: Create a new conversion for a previously uploaded file.

200.description: Successful conversion - returns metadata of the converted file

400.description: Invalid input or conversion error (no converter found)

delete.summary: Delete all converted files and their relations to the original files
delete.description: Delete all converted files and their relations for the current user

delete.summary: Delete a converted file and its relation to the original file
delete.description: Delete a converted file and its relation

200.description: List of converters with supported input and output formats

get.description:
Return the current user's application settings.

Cleanup settings are always sourced from the first admin's row,
since they are a system-wide concern managed by administrators.

patch.description:
Partially update the current user's settings. Only provided fields are changed.

Cleanup settings (cleanup_enabled, cleanup_ttl_minutes) are admin-only.

get.description: Return all user-configured default format mappings.

put.description: Create or update a default output format for a given input format.

delete.description: Remove a default format mapping for the given input format.

get.description: Return whether the application still needs its first admin account.

200.description: Whether first-time user setup is required

get.description: Return all users without exposing password hashes.

post.description: Create a new user and hash the provided password before storage.
Issue a JWT bearer token using the OAuth2 password flow form.
Validate username and password and issue a JWT bearer token.

get.description: Return the authenticated user derived from the bearer token.

patch.description: Allow a user to update their own account except for role changes.

get.description: Return a user by UUID without exposing the password hash.

patch.description: Partially update a user, hashing a replacement password when provided.

delete.description: Delete a user by UUID and cascade-remove all their data.

get.summary: List API keys for the current user
get.description: Return all API keys belonging to the authenticated user (without hashes).

post.description:
Generate a new API key for the authenticated user.

The raw key is returned exactly once in this response and is never stored.

201.description: API key created (raw key shown once)

delete.description: Delete one of the authenticated user's API keys.

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: First 8 characters of the key for identification

api_keys.title: Api Keys
api_keys.description: List of API keys for the user

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: First 8 characters of the key for identification

keep_originals.title: Keep Originals
keep_originals.description: Retain uploaded source files after conversion

cleanup_enabled.title: Cleanup Enabled
cleanup_enabled.description: Enable automatic cleanup of old files

cleanup_enabled.title: Cleanup Enabled
cleanup_enabled.description: Enable automatic cleanup of old files

file_ids.title: File Ids
file_ids.description: List of converted file IDs to download

detail.title: Detail
detail.example: No converter found for jpg to png

metadata.description: Uploaded file metadata with compatible formats

requires_setup.title: Requires Setup
requires_setup.description: Whether the first admin account still needs to be created
